name: Idigital Internet
notes: Canadian Web Hosting and its subsidiaries represent a comprehensive service structure designed to meet their client's most demanding requirements. With proven experience and stability that is unique for a technology company, Canadian Web Hosting is a leading managed hosting company that specializes in hosting business and enterprise-class clients. One of only a few SAS70 Type II and CICA 5970 certified service providers in Canada, Canadian Web Hosting delivers a secure and scalable service delivery for a diverse range of companies throughout Canada.
